title: Tallinn, Harju County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tallinn, Harju County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tallinn is a city in Harju County with a population of 437,619. Estonia’s medieval-meets-digital capital, a UNESCO-listed Hanseatic old town, a global e-government pioneer, and a thriving startup scene with Skype roots.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
